release_summary: QB stack-completion calibration fix (BBM7 + Puppy contests only). Per Chris Wecht's feedback that BPA/CLV matter less for QBs since correlation dominates, position-specific BPA decay + CLV per-pick + single-anchor stack weight now let stack-completion candidates win over higher-ADP non-stack QBs when ranks are close. Example: Herbert (with McConkey LAC + Rice KC bring-back) now correctly ranks above Dak (no DAL stack-mate). BigDog regressed in cross-validation so the fix is BBM7+Puppy-scoped.
